reason: Agent QA-20260421-192508-9f49 successfully received a message and responded with the correct answer "4" to the math question "What is 2+2?"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with Super Agent app and sidebar visible showing three agents
Clicked agent "QA-20260421-192508-9f49" in sidebar - Agent detail page opened successfully, displaying agent status as "idle"
Verified agent status is "idle" - Status indicator confirmed agent is idle (meets requirement of "running" or "idle")
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in message input field - Message was successfully entered in the textbox
Clicked Send button to submit message - Message was sent, agent status changed to "working", and a new session "Basic Math Question Session" was created
Waited up to 3 minutes for response - Agent responded within 3 seconds with the answer "4" and returned to "idle" status
Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot - Agent's response clearly displays "4" as shown in the screenshot, confirming the correct mathematical answer was provided
